description_long: This is a modern wall-mounted radiator with a striking red finish, featuring a series of evenly spaced horizontal bars that serve as heat-dissipating fins. The radiator is mounted on a flat, rectangular white panel, which likely serves as a backing or mounting surface. The horizontal bars are tubular and parallel, with a slight gap between each, creating a ladder-like appearance. At the bottom right, there is a visible valve assembly, likely for manual control of water flow or temperature. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, suitable for urban interiors or utility spaces. The construction appears to be primarily metal, with a powder-coated surface for durability and aesthetics.
description: A red, wall-mounted radiator with horizontal tubular bars on a white rectangular backing, featuring a visible valve at the bottom right. The design is modern and functional, with a ladder-like appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full array of red horizontal bars and the valve assembly at the bottom right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile of the radiator and the protrusion of the horizontal bars from the white backing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain white rectangular backing with no visible radiator elements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the arrangement of the horizontal bars.
attribute_pipe_connections: single connection at bottom right, horizontally oriented
